item_14049_Description: A small runestone that's worth a small fortune at the Red Wing Casino. See Qatik to trade this for 15,000 Councils.
item_1404_Description: This import from the Crone Hegemony doesn't do anything directly -- although the eye in the amulet does follow you around and glare. It is primarily used as a base magic source by magical jewelrycrafters.
item_14050_Description: A small runestone that's worth a small fortune at the Red Wing Casino. See Qatik to trade this for 20,000 Councils.
item_14051_Description: A small runestone that's worth a small fortune at the Red Wing Casino. See Qatik to trade this for 25,000 Councils.
item_14052_Description: A small runestone that's worth a small fortune at the Red Wing Casino. See Qatik to trade this for 50,000 Councils.
item_14053_Description: This reddish token is made of very thin metal. There are tiny inscrutable symbols painted on the back side. (See Qatik at the Red Wing Casino to trade these tokens for prizes.)
item_14054_Description: A small plush bear. It's enchanted to give encouraging messages when you're sad.
item_14055_Description: See Qatik in the Red Wing Casino to trade this token in for a magical crown!
item_14056_Description: A lovely stuffed toy with joyous cymbal-clashing action. It can be deployed periodically to entertain others.
item_14057_Description: A tiny key made of jade.
item_14058_Description: Made of an unfamiliar metal, this key has weird lines etched all over it.
item_14059_Description: A weird symbol carved into a strange metal.
item_1405_Description: This flask is made of nice metal - pity it has a huge hole in the side.
item_14060_Description: An old key encrusted in slime. Somehow it passed beyond the veil of death! But it's back now.
item_14061_Description: A small valuable item encased in protective goop. The goblin technique for removing the stuff requires special equipment. Perhaps there's another means to open it.
item_14062_Description: A fancy key that can open any Minotaur Vault. For security reasons the key is destroyed upon use.
item_14063_Description: A piece of paper that says "This document is worth 1 (one) Sir Johnson Buck, redeemable at participating commissaries. Sir Johnson retains the right to confiscate this document if he thinks you stole it." Beneath the impeccably-handwritten note is an illegible scrawl that you assume is Sir Johnson's signature.
item_14064_Description: The first volume in a series of travelogues and interviews by the semi-famous mage Reginald.
item_14065_Description: The second volume in a series of travelogues and interviews by the semi-famous mage Reginald.
item_14066_Description: The title is dull, but the cover art suggests something... less dull. However, someone has torn out the front half of the book, leaving only appendices.
item_14067_Description: A bone key that fits in the special chest in Serbule for level 80 loot. (Look behind the inn.)
item_14068_Description:
This token can be redeemed with -ADMIN- Jackencola for up to a level 80 max-enchanted ring, necklace or piece of armor of choice.
This token can only be redeemed by the account that won it. The prize is non-transferable.
item_14069_Description: This token is the special currency of the Crafter's Guild. It seems to have no real Council value to it, but the members of the Crafting Caravan value them for trade among fellow professionals.
item_1406_Description: This might have been a treasure map! But it's ruined now.
item_14070_Description: The strange substance in this bag can keep dying fairies from leaving this plane of existence. It costs 50 Fae Energy to use this item. It smells of honey. (This item is useless to non-fae.)
item_14071_Description:
This special mixture grants you the ability to carry more stuff at one time, which is essential when out traveling for a long period of time.
This effect does not stack with other inventory expansion potions from Orran and overrides all inventory Words of Power.
item_14072_Description:
This special mixture grants you the ability to carry a lot more stuff at one time, which is essential when out traveling for a long period of time.
This effect does not stack with other inventory expansion potions from Orran and overrides all inventory Words of Power.
item_14073_Description:
This special mixture grants you the ability to carry a whole lot more stuff at one time, which is essential when out traveling for a long period of time.
This effect does not stack with other inventory expansion potions from Orran and overrides all inventory Words of Power.
item_14074_Description: A strange cube. It once held augmentation magic, but it's been damaged beyond repair. You might be able to salvage something from it... if you knew how to open it without shattering it.
item_14075_Description: This crate contains one pet, ready for travel or just some R&R.
item_14076_Description: This token was earned by participating in a live event. The live-event system no longer uses tokens like this, though, and now this token is just a reminder of fun times had.
item_14077_Description: Part of an abomination. It has an identification mark branded into it. Might be useful to impersonate an abomination... but mostly just junk.
item_14078_Description: A beautiful collar with a unique identification number chiseled into the inside. As well as being made of silver, it might be useful for accessing certain supply crates.
item_1407_Description: This piece of parchment has been folded into the shape of a boat.
item_14081_Description: An exotic key. As a security mechanism, it self-destructs after a few days.
item_14082_Description: A special token from Raim to barter for a special advanced item.
item_14083_Description: A special token from Moxie to barter for a special advanced item.
item_14084_Description: An old metal key from a dusty old chest you found under Hogan's Keep. Utterly unremarkable.
item_14085_Description: A shiny metal key from a goblin jewelry chest that you found under Hogan's Keep. Very well polished.
item_14086_Description: A scorched metal key you found in the belly of a fire spider under Hogan's Keep. This key has seen some hot action.
item_14087_Description: An antique, encrusted metal key. Unfortunately it appears to be encrusted in bear shit.
item_14088_Description: The bleeding end clotted up fast, so this severed goblin thumb is a little less disgusting than it could be.
item_1408_Description: A beat up wooden spoon. It's taken some damage.
item_14090_Description: Teaches you how to summon a vendor fox from a box.
item_14090_Name: Event: Vendor Fox in a Box
item_14091_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14092_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14093_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14094_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14095_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14096_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14097_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14098_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14099_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_1409_Description: These are perfect for corking bottles of not-yet-implemented craftable wine.
item_14100_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up.
item_14101_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up.
item_14102_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up.
item_14103_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up.
item_14104_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up. IMPORTANT: Everyone must have a Transport Security Card in their inventory to use this portal!
item_14105_Description: Teaches you how to deploy a special storage box.
item_14106_Description: A dead starfish. It's covered in a strange goop that stings to the touch.
item_14107_Description: An all-purpose token that can be used for various special or live events. To use or redeem this token, please follow the instructions given from the event you acquired it from. Please note that this token could disappear without notice once the associated event has ended.
item_14108_Description: An all-purpose token that can be used for various special or live events. To use or redeem this token, please follow the instructions given from the event you acquired it from. Please note that this token could disappear without notice once the associated event has ended.
item_14109_Description: An all-purpose token that can be used for various special or live events. To use or redeem this token, please follow the instructions given from the event you acquired it from. Please note that this token could disappear without notice once the associated event has ended.
item_1410_Description: A handful of buttons of all shapes and sizes.
item_14110_Description: A token of Ri-Shin's favor. The small branch is still fresh, with quite a few leaves. (See Snowleaf at the Shrine of Ri-Shin in Kur Mountains to trade these tokens for items.)
item_14111_Description: It's just a big sack of money.
item_14112_Description: A special potion that works similar to a Fairy Soul Anchor. Drinking this potion will grant a Fairy immunity from the Fae death penalty in the zone you are anchored to. IMPORTANT: You must drink this potion BEFORE you die! The effect will dispel if you leave the zone you are anchored to or logout.
item_14113_Description: When your snoot is just too tender to handle getting booped. Apply moderately to snoot. Reapply every 30 minutes as needed.
item_14117_Description: An acorn found on an old treant that had been growing in mire for ages. It apparently couldn't grow in that soil, but perhaps there's similar soil elsewhere in Povus that would work?
item_14118_Description: These notes describe how to use a "genetics analyzer" to discover hidden anatomical secrets of arthropods. It's very technical.
item_14119_Description: An old key coated in purple fungus.
item_1411_Description: These could be worn as small bracelets were it not for the extreme pain they cause when in contact with flesh. They emit a continuous shock.
item_14120_Description: An old key coated in bright red goo.
item_14121_Description: An old key marred by rust.
item_14122_Description: The key to a goblin equipment chest.
item_14123_Description: This item exists for validation purposes -- it is the prototypical item that cannot be sent to a saddlebag under any circumstances.
item_14124_Description: A poorly crafted music box that sounds like a lute for animal forms so they can play music for their plants. This box looks like it is only good for one use before it will break. Don't forget to start it up after you deploy it! IMPORTANT: You must be in beast form for at least 3 hours of in-game time before you can deploy this item. Leaving beast form after deploying will cause you to lose control of the box. Limit one music box deployment per account at a time.
item_14125_Description: A well crafted music box that sounds like a harp for animal forms so they can play music for their plants. This box looks sturdy enough for a few uses before it will break. Don't forget to start it up after you deploy it! IMPORTANT: You must be in beast form for at least 3 hours of in-game time before you can deploy this item. Leaving beast form after deploying will cause you to lose control of the box. Limit one music box deployment per account at a time.
item_14126_Description: A fae fruit that can make any piece of equipment look like an entirely different piece of equipment when worn. Just crush it up to absorb its power. [When you use this berry you'll receive one Glamour, and automatically learn the recipe to use Glamours if you don't already know how.]
item_14127_Description: A voucher for 10 Live Event Credits. Credits will be given to the person that uses this voucher.
item_14128_Description: A voucher for 25 Live Event Credits. Credits will be given to the person that uses this voucher.
item_14129_Description: A voucher for 50 Live Event Credits. Credits will be given to the person that uses this voucher.
item_1412_Description: From an Aktaari rake. They use them to cultivate evu fruit.
item_14130_Description: A voucher for 100 Live Event Credits. Credits will be given to the person that uses this voucher.
item_14131_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14132_Description: A fae fruit that can make any piece of equipment look like an entirely different piece of equipment when worn. Just smash it open to absorb its power. [When you use this gourd you'll receive one Glamour, and automatically learn the recipe to use Glamours if you don't already know how.]
item_14133_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up. IMPORTANT: You must be friends with Mope in Povus to use this portal!
item_14134_Description:
This token can be redeemed with -ADMIN- Jackencola for up to a level 85 legendary mastercrafted piece of modded gear.
This token can only be redeemed by the account that won it. The prize is non-transferable.
item_14135_Description: A magical token that allows access to the lower levels of the Anagoge Records Facility.
item_14136_Description: Pop the top and chug it down for 24 hours of getting down! This foul tasting fizzy liquid will grant you super buffs for 24 hours of real time. This liquid will destablize and evaporate 60 days after it is created, so use it quickly! Buffs include: Combat & crafting xp. Extra fish, mushrooms, wood, seeds and fruit. Gardening bonus harvest chance. Survey and mining buffs. Training discount. Meal and snack time buffs. Vendor stall discount. NPC workorder bonus. Faster liver recovery. IMPORTANT!: There is no visible timer on these buffs, so be sure to note the time when you drink this!
item_14137_Description: Pop the top and chug it down for 48 hours of getting down! This foul tasting fizzy liquid will grant you super buffs for 48 hours of real time. This liquid will destablize and evaporate 60 days after it is created, so use it quickly! Buffs include: Combat & crafting xp. Extra fish, mushrooms, wood, seeds and fruit. Gardening bonus harvest chance. Survey and mining buffs. Training discount. Meal and snack time buffs. Vendor stall discount. NPC workorder bonus. Faster liver recovery. IMPORTANT!: There is no visible timer on these buffs, so be sure to note the time when you drink this!
item_14138_Description: Pop the top and chug it down for 24 hours of getting down! This foul tasting fizzy liquid will grant you super buffs for 24 hours of real time. This liquid will destablize and evaporate 60 days after it is created, so use it quickly! Buffs include: Combat & crafting xp. Extra fish, mushrooms, wood, seeds and fruit. Gardening bonus harvest chance. Survey and mining buffs. Training discount. Meal and snack time buffs. Vendor stall discount. NPC workorder bonus. Faster liver recovery. IMPORTANT!: There is no visible timer on these buffs, so be sure to note the time when you drink this!
item_14139_Description: It's a flier about supporting "local fauna", whatever that means. But it's very hard to read because most of the text is mirrored. Very strange.
item_1413_Description: These were probably part of a child's game set. There are only a handful left.
item_14140_Description: It's a rough sketch of a bear wearing a pirate hat. It is holding a jug of rum. Along the top are the words "When it's all too much to bear, say yoho!" and along the bottom: "Remga's Raging Rum"
item_14141_Description: It claims that the holder of this letter is entitled to one fiftieth (1/50) of a door opening, or one tenth (1/10) of a free magical scroll. It doesn't say how one would redeem the letter, however.
item_14142_Description: It claims that the holder of this letter is entitled to nothing. Absolutely nothing.
item_14143_Description: It's a cracked bottle that stinks of rum. There was a label once, but it's mostly peeled off.
item_14144_Description: A pile of flaky rock. What could this be for?
item_14145_Description: A mixture of grains to keep your birds fat, happy and energized.
item_14146_Description: Use this item to summon a temporary trash can that anyone can use. Note: Items thrown in the trash are lost forever!
item_14147_Description: Grants a brief period of vincibility to the usually-invincible.
item_14148_Description: A key for a student's trunk. Ah, the sight of this key takes you back!
item_14149_Description: This writ is redeemable for 1 point during the Writ Challenge event.
item_1414_Description: Made by ranalon to feed their pet frogs during low-insect times. They can also be eaten by ranalon in an emergency.
item_14150_Description: This writ is redeemable for 25 points and 250,000 councils during the Writ Challenge event. Use this writ to get a special quest, then see the Writ Master located near the Serbule well to collect your prize.
item_14151_Description: A small handheld device studded with aquamarines that can summon a portal to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when all of the charges have been used up.
item_14152_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14153_Description: These notes describe how to use a "genetics analyzer" to discover hidden anatomical secrets of non-ruminant ungulates. It's very technical.
item_14154_Description: A thick treatise intended for those interested in breeding horses.
item_14155_Description: Describes the known types of horses, but sadly lacks pictures.
item_14156_Description: A pointy weed. (This item can be used in recipes that call for Mixed Greens.)
item_14157_Description: A toxic weed of dubious utility.
item_14159_Description: A rubbery weed. (This item can be used in recipes that call for Mixed Greens.)
item_1415_Description: Meant to prank your friends, these bombs don't explode. They are rightly disdained by most sentient persons.
item_14160_Description: A leafy weed. (This item can be used in recipes that call for Mixed Greens.)
item_14161_Description: A smoky-smelling weed. (This item can be used in recipes that call for Mixed Greens.)
item_14163_Description: A rather lengthy journal detailing the day-to-day life of its owner. The final passage in it reads: "... As I lie here, the cold grip of my final moments closing in, a single regret consumes me. All these years we've spent together - laughing, fighting, discovering the world - yet you could never see the truth burning in my heart. Lasri, you've always been so blind to the feelings of those around you... to my feelings. If you ever fi- [The rest of the page is too damaged to decipher, the ink smudged by tears long dried.]"
item_14164_Description: Use this item to deploy a Keg of Love which will explode and spread its love to everyone around it within 20 meters.
item_14165_Description: A special token from Riston to barter for a special advanced item.
item_14166_Description: A special token from Tryaka to barter for a special advanced item.
item_14167_Description: A small handheld device with a large amethyst set in the center used to teleport the wielder to an attuned location. This device will self destruct when the charge has expired.
item_14168_Description: It looks like it fits a heavy stone box.
item_14169_Description: A weird container made of crystal. Inside is the essence of knowledge in liquid form. Used by the most advanced crafters.
item_1416_Description: A small wad of stinky swamp vegetation. It can be burned into potash for use in glassblowing, although the process is very unreliable, usually yielding only strange dirt.
item_14170_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "1" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14171_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "2" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14172_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "3" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14173_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "4" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14174_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "5" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14175_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on the "6" side 50% of the time. Due to unwise goblin engineering, there is always 4% chance the die explodes in a shower of acid when rolled.
item_14176_Description: A six-sided die with a hidden gizmo that causes it to land on one side more often than others. You'll have to roll it to figure out what it's weighted for.
item_14177_Description: One year after issuance, the upstanding citizen bearing this document may redeem it at the Statehelm Bank.
item_14178_Description: One year after issuance, the upstanding citizen bearing this document may redeem it at the Statehelm Bank.
item_14179_Description: Powdered soap. Used with a bucket of water to remove graffiti.
item_1417_Description: A cheap tin cup stained with tea.
item_14181_Description: Can be used to repair a malfunctioning lamp in Statehelm. (Not every broken lamp requires a replacement bulb, but you always need one on hand when trying to repair a lamp. It's just common sense.)
item_14182_Description: "The sensational best-selling diary of a maid from the Crone Hegemony. This was saved from obscurity due to one scene that documents the first sabotage attack of the (at-the-time-unrecognized) Night Executioner, the deadly hitman who is STILL. AT. LARGE. Read of his first heinous exploits here!"
item_14183_Description: Activate this gross beacon in a certain place to let ranalon know it's time to invade.
item_14184_Description: Use this item to claim 1 month of VIP membership.
item_14185_Description: This fertilizer has been made utterly unusable by the addition of salt.
item_1420_Description: A strange heavy disk. It plugs into something.
item_1421_Description: A demonic crystal that can be used to repair magical items.
item_1422_Description: A dollop of blood from the realm known as "Acur", where blood flows as freely as water does here.
item_1423_Description: A chunk from a destroyed sun guardian statue. It crumbles easily into a magical healing powder that can be applied to the skin.
item_1424_Description: This bulky sack contains especially hard sand. It is used in creating abrasives.
item_1425_Description: Very finely ground sand mixed with clay. A useful construction sand, but bulky.
item_1426_Description: This small bag of sand is almost painful to the touch. Its most common use is in crafting magical items, where it is used as a magic insulator during smithing.
item_1427_Description: This bulky sack contains sand. It's clean, mid-grain sand.
item_1428_Description: A sack of weird-smelling herbs and vegetables. It's a goblin secret formula that supposedly improves mating chances. Best results when given to both the male and female horse.
item_1429_Description: A scale from a dragon! Hmm, it'd be a pretty small dragon... or, more likely, some dragon-kin creature.
item_1430_Description: The last pulse of blood from a dying mortal taken by a vampire. These few drops of blood contain a sliver of the victim's soul.
item_1431_Description: An elaborate network of nerves that connects the three heads together.
item_1432_Description: A spiky neck contraption that goes on the dominant head of a cerberus, hopefully preventing it from killing its masters.
item_1433_Description: This strain of gur-horta is relatively weak, making it a poor choice for refining into combat potions. However, it's popular among orcs that smoke the leaves recreationally due to its vibrant aroma and low side-effects.
item_1434_Description: This perfectly-preserved snail shell has been infected with demonic essence.
item_1435_Description: This rock is always painfully hot to the touch.
item_1436_Description: A scroll filled to the brim with research notes about demons. To the right person this would be probably be very informative.
item_1437_Description: A device that spins continuously when you hold it a certain way.
item_1438_Description: A device that spins furiously when you hold it a certain way.
item_1439_Description: An orcish invention similar to a Dwarven N Core, but much more powerful. It has the same shape and size as the Dwarven version.
item_1440_Description: The slimy, sticky skin of an icy frog. DO NOT LICK!
item_1441_Description: A potent mixture of magical blood.
item_1442_Description: An old, forgotten memory that has been written down so as not to forget it again. This is used to remind certain people about certain events.
item_1443_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Hate. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1444_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Hate. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1446_Description: This coin appeared magically when you solved the semi-destroyed altar in Vidaria. It can be placed back onto the altar to redeem it for a special item, but it may have other uses...
item_1447_Description: A factual statement about demons. Collect enough of these and Ferris Blueheart in Vidaria can turn them into a Scroll of Demonic Research.
item_1448_Description: A strangely burned bone. It leaves black smudges on everything it touches.
item_1449_Description: A very old goblet that remains cold to the touch even in hot weather. It's made of a strange metal that might be worth studying.
item_1450_Description: A weird puff of animated air. It's odd how it doesn't disperse.
item_1452_Description: The slimy, sticky skin of a demonic frog. DO NOT LICK!
item_1453_Description: Good for making bottles. But not that good: it's not especially pure or clean.
item_1454_Description: This is great for making bottles.
item_1455_Description: Having been blasted by hellfire, this sand is especially pure. A little cursed, but pure. It's good for magical bottles.
item_1456_Description: Made from the ashes of certain plants, this is useful in glassblowing.
item_1457_Description: Made from the ashes of certain plants, this is useful in glassblowing.
item_1458_Description: A lump of stinking acidic green ooze.
item_1459_Description: A big chunk of glass infused with intellect-improving magic. You could use it on yourself to boost your intellect for a while.
item_1460_Description: The heart of a demon. While it no longer beats, it still smoulders with some sort of flame.
item_1461_Description: Though it resembles a tiny pearl, it is made of almost-pure Hate. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1462_Description: Though it resembles a tiny pearl, it is made of almost-pure misery and loathing. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1463_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure misery and loathing. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1464_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure misery and loathing. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1465_Description: Though it resembles a tiny pearl, it is made of almost-pure Greed and jealousy. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1466_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Greed and jealousy. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1467_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Greed and jealousy. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1468_Description: Though it resembles a tiny pearl, it is made of almost-pure Fear mixed with some Revulsion. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1469_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Fear mixed with some Revulsion. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1470_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Fear mixed with some Revulsion. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1471_Description: Though it resembles a tiny pearl, it is made of almost-pure Lust. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1472_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Lust. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1473_Description: Though it resembles a pearl, it is made of almost-pure Lust. It's too emotional to be used in crafting.
item_1474_Description: A symbol of merit granted by the Church of Arisetsu to the faithful. Sometimes they are given in exchange for donations; other times they are awarded for service.
item_1475_Description: Faded print declares that Jasmine's Fiery Blades has now opened in Statehelm. It seems to have closed some time after.
item_1476_Description: It says "This acts as a receipt to the perpetrator of a crime. __ demerits to _____ for ____." It hasn't been filled out.
item_1477_Description: A love poem from a young man to a young woman. Apparently the young woman's eyes are like hot diamonds, whatever that means.
item_1478_Description: These vouchers were used with the first version of Statehelm's cornucopia, but that was years ago. The newest system is fully automated and these are but souvenirs.
item_1479_Description: A small clay-fired pot. It could theoretically hold water, but since glass bottles are objectively better, you refuse to do so on principle. Nice pot though.
item_14941_Description: A volume of the famous 37-book series describing the history of the gods. This edition includes annotations and commentary from the Council.
item_14942_Description: Use this item to claim 1 month of VIP membership.
item_15001_Description: It's a taste only an alchemist would call appetizing. "But it has sugar in it!" As if that offset the taste of dirt!
item_15002_Description: There's little spider hairs floating on the top. Mmmm. But it'll take the poison down a notch.
item_15003_Description: Consume this fuzzy gel when you're suffering from poison.
item_15004_Description: A thick blue paste that accelerates the leg muscles beyond their natural capacity.
item_15005_Description: A super-thick blue paste that accelerates the leg muscles far beyond their natural capacity.
item_15006_Description: This smelly gel will hyper-accelerate your heart. What could go wrong?
item_15007_Description: This smelly gel will overclock your brain. What could go wrong?
item_15008_Description: Rub this lotion into your scalp to increase your brainpower.
item_15009_Description: Rub this lotion into your scalp to increase your brainpower.
item_15010_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a thick black goo. This item is used by the Poison Blade ability.
item_15011_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a thick black goo. This item is used by the Poison Blade 2 ability.
item_15012_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a thick black goo. This item is used by the Poison Blade 3 ability.
item_15013_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a thick black goo. This item is used by the Poison Blade 4 ability.
item_15014_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a thick black goo. This item is used by the Poison Blade 5 ability.
item_15015_Description: This strawberry is no longer fit to eat.
item_15018_Description: This thick liquid has little glowing orbs in it.
item_15019_Description: A slimy liquid with bits of bird beak floating in it. Rub it on your hands to make your poison attacks more deadly!
item_15020_Description: Rub this potion into your hair and head and your memory will stop working so well.
item_15021_Description: Makes your attacks generate double Rage in enemies, allowing them to use their Rage attacks more often. Popular among assholes and masochists.
item_15022_Description: Makes your attacks generate 25% less Rage, preventing enemies from using their Rage attacks as often.
item_15023_Description: Makes your attacks generate 50% less Rage, preventing enemies from using their Rage attacks as often.
item_15024_Description: It's bubbling! Like magma! But it's not actually very hot.
item_15025_Description: Lets you leap high and control your fall. You also take no damage from falls, no matter how high. On the down side, you'll be too disoriented to effectively fight, and your attacks will deal very little damage.
item_15026_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a toxic goo that's especially deadly to wolves and lycanthropes. This item is used by the Wolfsbane Blade ability.
item_15027_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a toxic goo that's especially deadly to wolves and lycanthropes. This item is used by the Wolfsbane Blade 2 ability.
item_15028_Description: A small sharp blade coated in a toxic goo that's especially deadly to wolves and lycanthropes. This item is used by the Wolfsbane Blade 3 ability.
item_15029_Description: An insane amount of sugar has been used to totally mask the ingredients' taste. Now it just tastes like pure sugar, which is still kind of revolting.
item_15030_Description: A tiny vial of freezing-cold liquid.
item_15031_Description: A tiny vial of freezing-cold liquid.
item_15032_Description: A tiny vial of freezing-cold liquid.
item_15033_Description: A small vial of foul liquid. Its formula is a secret known only to werewolf clans.
item_15034_Description: A small vial of foul liquid. Its formula is a secret known only to werewolf clans.
item_15036_Description: Rub this potion into your hair and head and your short-term memory will break.
item_15037_Description: This... this is not a lager. This is a bottle of mushroom bits.
item_15038_Description: A dollop of ooze in a tiny vial.
item_15039_Description: A tiny vial full of ooze of some sort.
item_15040_Description: This one smells horrific, even by Alchemist's standards.
item_15041_Description: This one smells horrific, even by Alchemist's standards. The bottle's also strangely cold to the touch. (Note: you will not recover the bottle after drinking; it is too damaged by acid to be reusable.)
item_15042_Description: It's a bottle of liquified feathers. Yum.
item_15043_Description: It tastes like mushroom gravy. Well, it is mushroom gravy, kinda. Plus pyrite for that extra crunch.
item_15044_Description: The florid smell of rotting mushroom gives this potion that special something.
item_15045_Description: This thick liquid has bits of fulgurite in it. Mm.
item_15046_Description: Tastes like it will burn your tongue off... and it probably would, if the magic didn't kick in first.
item_15047_Description: A small disposable vial of slimy liquid. Rub it on your hands to make your poison attacks more deadly!
item_15048_Description: Boosts all of your attacks, but your maximum Power will be significantly reduced. Tastes like sludge.
item_15049_Description: A small vial of foul liquid. Its formula is a secret known only to werewolf clans.
item_15050_Description: A small vial of foul liquid. Its formula is a secret known only to werewolf clans.
item_15051_Description: Swallowing this small pebble will teleport you to the Teleportation Circle that you're bound to.
item_15052_Description: Bits of meat are floating in this small vial of sugar water.
item_15053_Description: Six different mushrooms make this a very stinky potion.
item_15054_Description: This is a few drops of a thick purple liquid. Just touching the vial gives you a mild shock.
item_15055_Description: It looks like water. Tastes like potato. ... so it's magic potato-water, basically.
item_15056_Description: This potion uses very spicy ingredients to distract you from the very disgusting other ingredients.
item_15057_Description: The unusual odor distracts your senses into not noticing the tar-like potion's foul taste.
item_15058_Description: A popular orcish drug that overcharges your brainstem. That sounds horrifying, and it kind of is, but this low dose generally has few side-effects.
item_15059_Description: A popular orcish drug that overcharges your brainstem. This advanced purified version of the drug is quite strong.
item_15060_Description: A party bowl of disgusting substances. Anyone who drinks it becomes violently ill... with emphasis on the violent.
item_15061_Description: Consume this fuzzy gel when you're suffering poison effects.
item_15062_Description: A small flask of oil. Perfect for lighting lamps! It may have other uses, too.
item_15063_Description: Pickled brain chunks with real bits of apple and just a tinge of dirt.
item_15064_Description: Spider legs and brain bits in a slurry of disgusting chemicals!
item_15065_Description: A small wax-sealed container with a dollop of blue sludge inside.
item_15066_Description: Powdered bone blended with wax and milk into a semi-solid sludge.
item_15067_Description: Powdered bone blended with wrappings into a semi-solid sludge.
item_15068_Description: A wax-sealed decanter full of liquified bones.
item_15069_Description: A wax-sealed decanter full of liquified bones.
item_15071_Description: This odd potion makes your skin extremely tough. It's a fairly uncomfortable sensation, having impervious skin.
item_15072_Description: This potion can teach you what it's like to have fluid stone instead of skin. It's an unpleasant sensation but its combat efficacy is impressive.
item_15073_Description: Minty fresh yet full of dirt, this creepy vial of fluid will make you better able to manage the growth of plants.
item_15074_Description: This vial of liquid contains fragments of animated plants' roots, still writhing. Chug it down and don't think about it!
item_15075_Description: A vial of the strange substance known as mercury or quicksilver. It is used in hatmaking, gadget creation, and alchemy. Under no circumstances should it be drunk.
item_15076_Description: This thick muddy substance causes your storage capacity to grow without the problem of unsightly pocket bulges.
item_15077_Description:
The liquid in this cauldron is sure to cause hallucinations and may bring out latent magic effects in unpredictable ways. It's insanely dangerous.

Once deployed, any player can drink from the cauldron. It disappears after five minutes.
item_15078_Description: A pungent perfume that rakshasa find irresistable, but most other races find rather displeasant. (Orcs generally tolerate the smell well, and some even like it.) The perfume smells faintly of raw meat, cinnamon, and daisies.
item_15079_Description: A musky elvish perfume currently in vogue in Verta. Its complex scent can mask dirt and odors even from cleanliness-loving elves.
item_15080_Description: A spicy perfume concocted by humans. A commercial failure at its goal of helping human men woo women, it found new life among solitary huntsmen, foresters, and others (of both sexes) who feel stronger and more bad-ass while wearing it.
item_15082_Description: A thick green paste that smells of pine needles and dirt.
item_15083_Description: A drink that accelerates your underwater fast-movement speed. It tastes atrocious.
item_15084_Description: An orcish concoction that uses your anger to keep you warm.
item_15085_Description: A vile-tasting potion used by some orcs and rakshasa.
item_15086_Description: This smells and tastes like rotten fruit. It's thick as mud.
item_15087_Description: This spicy-yet-slimy liquid toughens your flesh so that you're better insulated against the cold.
item_15088_Description: A hypothetical recipe designed by a Gazluk sage. He never tested it due to a lack of kraken parts, so he doesn't know how incredibly vile it smells.
item_15089_Description: This foul orcish invention gives you a burst of energy to win a battle... but you don't typically get to celebrate for long.
item_15090_Description: This toxic compound burns the body, but it masks the symptoms of alcohol withdrawal. Carried in every dwarven medical kit.
item_15091_Description: A horrifically violent compound that can be applied to knives.
item_15092_Description: A horrifically violent compound that can be applied to knives.
item_15093_Description: A horrifically violent compound that can be applied to knives.
item_15094_Description: A horrifically violent compound that can be applied to knives.
item_15095_Description: Swallowing this small pebble will teleport you to the Red Wing Casino.
item_15096_Description: Created by priests of Arisetsu, this pleasant drink wards away the cold.
item_15097_Description: A small flask of lubricant. Perfect for fixing jammed machinery! It may have other uses, too.
item_15098_Description: A milky substance that alters your brain's reflexes, allowing you to punt spiders, scorpions and other arthropods away from you.
item_15099_Description: This was designed to empower Winter Court fae who've installed Ice Hearts in themselves. Others who can stomach the liquid still gain its benefits, but also a nasty side-effect. (Due to the ingredients, this potion is supposedly forbidden by the Autumn Council of Forbidders.)
item_15101_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15102_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15103_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15104_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15105_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15106_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15107_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15108_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15109_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water. DO NOT DRINK!
item_15110_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15111_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15112_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water.
item_15113_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water. DO NOT DRINK!
item_15114_Description: A rather murky heterogeneous mixture of mushroom bits in water. DO NOT DRINK!
item_15201_Description: A corrosive alchemical liquid with many household uses. It's also commonly used to clean gemstones before cutting.
item_15202_Description: A corrosive alchemical liquid with many common uses.
item_15203_Description: A corrosive alchemical liquid that is far too dangerous for common use, and is best left to experts.
item_15204_Description: A corrosive alchemical liquid that is far too dangerous for common use, and is best left to experts.
item_15211_Description: A jar of deadly acid with a grassy smell. It supposedly has many uses ranging from cleaning armor to cooking meals.
item_15212_Description: Perma-frozen grizlark from an unnaturally cold Kuvou. In this form it is inert, so you can handle it easily.
item_15231_Description: A thin fluid used to create augmentation oils (for level 30 effects).
item_15232_Description: A thin fluid used to create augmentation oils (for level 40 effects).
item_15233_Description: A thin fluid used to create augmentation oils (for level 50 effects).
item_15234_Description: A thin fluid used to create augmentation oils (for level 60 effects).
item_15301_Description: Powdered brains of psychic creatures. A choice drug for psychics.
item_15302_Description: Powdered brains of psychic creatures. A choice drug for psychics. This batch is 99% pure frontal cortex.
item_15303_Description: Powdered brains of psychic creatures. A choice drug for psychics. This batch has been enhanced with secret chemicals.
item_15304_Description: A substance made of cranium powder, mixed with chemicals that alter its effect.
item_15305_Description: Powdered brains of psychic creatures, cut with secret and dangerous substances that enhance its effect on psychics.
item_15331_Description: The enchanted and ground-up pineal glands of intelligent creatures, in a sweet syrupy liquid.
item_15332_Description: The enchanted and ground-up pineal glands of intelligent creatures. No syrup added, just pure pineal juice.
item_15333_Description: The enchanted and ground-up pineal glands of intelligent creatures, mixed with a secret catalyst for added effect.
item_15334_Description: A lemony liquid designed to counter the effects of severe Pineal Juice abuse.
item_15335_Description: The enchanted and ground-up pineal glands of intelligent creatures, mixed with a secret catalyst for added effect.
item_15341_Description: A packet of strange chemicals wrapped in a leaf. It's said that some sentient animals find this drug irresistible.
item_15342_Description: A packet of strange chemicals wrapped in a leaf. It's said that some sentient animals find this drug irresistible.
item_15343_Description: A packet of strange chemicals wrapped in a leaf. It's said that some sentient animals find this drug irresistible.
item_15344_Description: A packet of strange chemicals wrapped in a leaf. It's said that some sentient animals find this drug irresistible.
item_15345_Description: A packet of strange chemicals wrapped in a leaf. While it has minor benefits, its primary use is to cure Bounceweed hangovers. It can also temporarily relieve the symptoms of Bounceweed abuse. Calmweed is not addictive.
item_15346_Description:
A thin tube full of liquid. Apparently you jab it into your skin to use it -- a horrific idea that only a mantis could dream up.

Sharpen is supposedly not addictive.
item_15347_Description:
A thin tube full of liquid. Apparently you jab it into your skin to use it -- a horrific idea that only a mantis could dream up.

Sharpen is supposedly not addictive, but higher-quality doses are only effective if the recipient has well-honed survival instincts.

item_15751_Description: The essence of a demon. If you hold it in your hand, you can hear a quiet scream that nobody else can.
item_15752_Description:
Purified essence of a demon. If you hold it in your hand, you can hear a low hum.

Consuming this essence will cure you of all Hellfire currently infesting your body. This includes Lesser, normal, and Greater Hellfire.
item_15753_Description: A wisp of demonic essence. Gather enough of these and you can combine their energies into a Demonic Essence.
item_15761_Description: Known colloquially as "Heckfreeze", this ointment is applied topically and cures up to 10 stacks of Lesser Hellfire.
item_15762_Description: Known colloquially as "Heckfreeze", this concoction is consumed to cure all stacks of Lesser Hellfire.
item_15763_Description: When applied topically, this ointment cures up to 10 stacks of Hellfire and Lesser Hellfire.
item_15764_Description: When consumed, this concoction cures all stacks of Hellfire and Lesser Hellfire.
item_15765_Description: This industrial-strength Hellfreeze cures up to 10 stacks of Greater Hellfire, Hellfire, and Lesser Hellfire when applied topically.
item_15766_Description: This industrial-strength Hellfreeze cures all stacks of Greater Hellfire, Hellfire, and Lesser Hellfire when ingested.
item_15801_Description: A sweet syrupy potion that warms the throat when drunk.
item_15802_Description: It looks like milk, but stinks like mashed-up spider bits.
item_15804_Description: Just pulped-up spider bits in a jar.
item_15805_Description: Bits of ground-up stinger are floating in it.
item_15806_Description: It tastes like pureed salad. And since you use it by applying it to your skin, you too will smell like pureed salad.
item_15807_Description: A topical balm beloved by ranalon, who apply it to their skin continuously. Its effects are much weaker when applied to non-ranalon, but it is, at least, safe to use.
item_15810_Description: An unpleasant substance that activates every area of your tongue at once.
item_15811_Description: A terrible-smelling liquid that actually only tastes unpleasant, not terrible.
item_15812_Description: It tastes like orange juice! Kind of!
item_15813_Description: Tastes like furry eyeballs but it makes all your motions feel crisp and sharp.
item_15814_Description: It tastes crunchy and unpleasant. As a side-effect, it's extremely difficult to relax while under the effect of this potion.
item_15815_Description: You don't want to think about the taste... it's best to drink something strong afterwards.
item_15816_Description: Weirdly cold and soupy, but not unpleasant to taste.
item_15817_Description: Smells like entrails. Tastes like entrails... but with an extremely unpleasant crunch.
item_15818_Description: Smells foul but doesn't really taste bad (for an alchemy potion).
item_15819_Description: Sniff that? Smells like feathers and hate. Definitely an archery potion.
item_15822_Description: This liquid is viscous and gross.
item_15823_Description: Smells of sulfur and tastes of hair. Typical alchemy nonsense.
item_15824_Description: Thick and crunchy, like any good potion.
item_15825_Description: Pigs drinking this are advised not to think about the ingredients lest they become depressed. And possibly very angry.
item_15826_Description: A little tastier than usual potions, perhaps. (But not good-tasting, to be clear.)
item_15827_Description: Milky. Hmm. Turns out that's not really a good thing when it comes to describing potion taste.
item_15829_Description: It smells awful and it leaves your tongue completely numb. So that's something.
item_15830_Description: A vaguely meat-flavored swill made all the more horrid with the addition of lumps of fur.
item_15831_Description: A few berries floating in a ghostly liquid.
item_15832_Description: Sparks of electricity dance within the otherwise plain-looking water. There's no way that's safe, right?
item_15841_Description: Named for the god of knowledge, this potion lets you see a few seconds into the future! It is permanent, however, and some scribes of Imatia have been driven insane by what they see.
item_15842_Description: This pleasant beverage helps you digest cheese.
item_15843_Description: This tasty beverage helps you digest cheese.
item_15844_Description: This delicious beverage helps you digest cheese.
item_15845_Description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.
item_15846_Description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.
item_15847_Description: An appetizer intended to be eaten before the cheese course.
item_15848_Description: An extremely secret formula used by ratkin sages to predict when and where rodents will appear.
item_15850_Description: A delayed-action potion which is tricky to use in stressful situations, and also tastes like bile.
item_15851_Description: This was obviously intended to be a Potion of Universal Resistance, but the ingredients were added in the wrong order, resulting in a revolting soup with an unpredictable effect.
item_15852_Description: A thick black paste that requires an iron stomach to drink. If you can keep it down, the potion protects from all types of damage, and even better, it can be combined with potions that protect against specific damage types.
item_15853_Description: A delayed-action potion which is tricky to use in stressful situations, and also tastes like wet cardboard.
item_15854_Description: The not-quite-dead remains of an ooze. It's mainly used as an ingredient in other potions, but it does have a healing effect when drunk -- assuming you have the gastronomic experience to tolerate the flavor without vomiting.
item_15855_Description:
This healing potion can be drunk many times. Just leave a drop in the bottom and it will refill right before your eyes! The secret? It's made with a still-living ooze. Unfortunately, the ooze is so thick that the average person can't manage to drink it. Also unfortunately, the ooze takes a few seconds to take effect.

This potion is best known as the favorite drink of Grita the Arbitrarily Murderous, the feared rakshasa pirate. She says the potion is light on the stomach, allowing her to drink far more of it than regular healing potions. But she's a pirate (and a rakshasa to boot), so most people take that with a grain of salt.
item_15856_Description: This potion alters your eyes so they work better when there's not much light. It's an ancient recipe that's quite effective, but the revolting taste has kept it from becoming too popular.
item_15857_Description: Useful primarily to mages, this apple-flavored potion causes explosions to be a little more particular about what they hit.
item_15858_Description: This potion helps you think like an animal. If you have an animal companion this lets you communicate a bit more efficiently.
item_15859_Description: Most people can't tell that this does anything at all. But it does have magic. Just not very good magic.
item_15859_Name: Potion of Extremely Minor Healing Receptiveness
item_15860_Description: This potion increases the size of your stomach by a very small amount. (This is usually not something to get too excited about.)
item_15861_Description: A flask of flammable liquid. It doesn't deal much damage, but any flame will keep trolls from regenerating, and this flame lasts a long time.
item_15862_Description: Blessed by a high priest of Au-Shin, this tube of liquid glows like a light.
item_15863_Description: This clear liquid has bubbles in it that never seem to pop.
item_15864_Description: A slimy gunk that lets you move like an eel. (Swimming buff does not stack with other swimming-buff potions.)
item_15865_Description: Stinky sludge that lets you move like a shark. (Swimming buff does not stack with other swimming-buff potions.)
item_15866_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your wing-stype permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15867_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your hairstyle permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15868_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your hair color permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15869_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your beard style permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15870_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your beard color permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15871_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your skin or fur color permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15872_Description: A blend of fairy wings and secret ingredients that are quite difficult to digest due to their repulsiveness. It is banned in half of the fairy courts, and readily available in the other half.
item_15873_Description: A blend of fairy wings and secret ingredients that are quite difficult to digest due to their repulsiveness. It is banned in half of the fairy courts, and readily available in the other half.
item_15874_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your wing-style permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15875_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your wing-style permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!

A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your wing-style permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15877_Description:
A dollop of cold, fruit-flavored magical liquid that will change your wing-style permanently. This item can melt.

NOTE: this changes an aspect of your character's appearance PERMANENTLY. Think before you drink!
item_15878_Description: A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance fluttering less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on Fae.
item_15879_Description:
A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance flight less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on druidic bird forms.
WARNING: Leaving bird form will cancel the effects of this lotion!
item_15880_Description:
A lotion created by Moxie of the Crafting Caravan in order to make long distance flight less stressful when applied directly to the wings. Unfortunately, this formula only works on giant bats. Also, since giant bat wings are so large, the bottle contains fewer doses than the other butters, but it's more effective, too.
WARNING: Leaving giant bat form will cancel the effects of this lotion!
item_15881_Description: A blend of fairy wings and secret ingredients that are quite difficult to digest due to their repulsiveness. It is banned in half of the fairy courts, and readily available in the other half.
item_15882_Description: A blend of fairy wings and secret ingredients that are quite difficult to digest due to their repulsiveness. It is banned in half of the fairy courts, and readily available in the other half.
item_15883_Description: A small metal cylinder with liquid sealed inside. There's a pull-tab on top to open it. The cylinder bears an image of a smiling Spring fairy. If you stare for a moment, she seems to mouth the cryptic words "Rez and Shine, You Live Again! Original Honey Flavor!"
item_15884_Description: A time-bending drink that allows one to perceive fairies before they exist.
item_15885_Description: A syrup of exotic tree seeds that will better attune your senses to the plant realm.
item_15886_Description: A small stone covered in special moss. Licking the moss gives ranalon a potent hallucinogenic effect. Other creatures experience a less-dramatic effect, but it's still notable.
item_15887_Description: A rock-hard fruit covered in ashy powder. It looks magical, but poisonous. Very poisonous.
item_15888_Description: This acrid topical ointment is an effective way to remove swamp parasites.
item_15889_Description: A psychic enhancement that lets you harness your formidable skeletal knowledge into a weapon. Tastes like chalk.
item_15890_Description: Why do acid resistance potions always have to TASTE like acid?
item_15891_Description: A dollop of liquid that seems like it's hissing from inside the glass.
item_15892_Description: It stinks of death but has a mild, pleasant taste.
item_15893_Description: A sarcastically-named elven drink that replenishes tempest energy. (For easy cleanup, the teapot magically biodegrades when the tea is consumed.)
item_15894_Description: An elf-only tea that boosts the chance of anatomy critical hits with archery attacks. (For easy cleanup, the teapot magically biodegrades when the tea is consumed.)
item_15897_Description: It's either very cold or very warm to the touch... it's hard to tell which.
item_15898_Description: So cold that your hand goes numb as soon as you touch it.
item_15901_Description: Makes your fingers tingle when you touch it.
item_15902_Description: Touching it gives an unpleasant static shock.
item_15904_Description: Smells like ground-up bees. (Pity you know what that smells like.)
item_15905_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15906_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15907_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15908_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15911_Description: It smells like mushrooms and cinnamon.
item_15913_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Elves and Fae
item_15914_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Dwarves and Crones
item_15916_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Cats and Rodents
item_15917_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Ruminants and Ungulates
item_15918_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Bears and Canines
item_15920_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Fish and Reptiles
item_15921_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Plants and Fungi
item_15922_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Giants and Aberrations
item_15923_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Undead and the Incorporeal
item_15924_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Elementals and Constructs
item_15925_Name: Critical Denial Potion: Rakshasa and Demons
item_15931_Description: An over-engineered potion that's quite tricky to make. There are probably easier ways to make an equivalent potion. But at least it's not addictive.
item_15932_Description: This pulls strength from the drinker's bones to give their body extra density. Smells of bone marrow.
item_15933_Description: Covers the drinker in a super-tough dermal layer. The extra flesh is mildly inconvenient when performing subtle evasive movements.
item_15934_Description: Causes the wearer's flesh to constantly regenerate at incredible speed. Slashing wounds appear to self-repair instantly! But the constant flesh-generation can be irksome.
item_15935_Description: Created by some very clever divination scholars in Statehelm, drinking this potion lets you detect where undead monsters will spawn a few seconds before they do.
item_15936_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15937_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15938_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.
item_15939_Description: It feels warm and calm like the last rays of a summer afternoon. It tastes like clean rainwater.

item_18021_Description:
This particular piece of fluorite is blue with white bands. Used in magic, it helps you communicate with animals. It also focuses the mind inwards.

Associated Primary Skill: Animal Handling
Associated Secondary Skill: Meditation
item_18022_Description:
It's a small peridot, mint green in color. Used in magic, it wards off distracting thoughts and helps align your accuracy.

Associated Primary Skill: Archery
Associated Secondary Skill: Calligraphy
item_18023_Description:
A small crystal made up of black and white bands. Used in magic, it guards against physical dangers.

Associated Primary Skill: Shield
Associated Secondary Skills: Armor Patching, Tanning, Leatherworking

This small gem is brownish orange. Used in magic, it provides extra courage or energy to someone under great stress.

Associated Primary Skill: Warden
Associated Secondary Skill: Tailoring
item_18025_Description:
A small orange gem with many magical uses. Humans appreciate it for its ability to reduce anxiety.

Associated Primary Skill: Battle Chemistry
item_18026_Description:
A pretty gem with dark green bands, it's well known for aiding magical communication.

Associated Primary Skills: Cow, Pig, Deer, Spider, Giant Bat, etc.
item_18027_Description:
A small piece of white quartz. High-quality pieces like this one can amplify elemental magic.

Associated Primary Skill: Fire Magic
item_18028_Description:
A dark red stone, known for its curative properties.

Associated Primary Skill: Druid

Associated Secondary Skill: First Aid
item_18029_Description:
A small gem, light blue-green in color. It's a traditional protective stone for fishermen.

Associated Primary Skill: Fishing
Associated Secondary Skill: Teleportation
item_18030_Description:
A small black stone. Knives that incorporate obsidian can be enchanted more thoroughly than regular blades.

Associated Primary Skill: Knives
Associated Secondary Skill: Toolcrafting
item_18031_Description:
A white stone with dark green veins, the moss agate is also known as the Gardener's Talisman.

Associated Primary Skill: Hammer

Associated Secondary Skills: Gardening, Mycology
item_18032_Description:
A small yellow topaz. An incredibly versatile magical stone.

Associated Primary Skill: Mentalism
item_18033_Description:
A purple stone, used in magic to facilitate travel.

Associated Primary Skill: Teleportation
item_18034_Description:
A lovely dark blue stone, with limited but potent magic uses.

Associated Primary Skill: Staff
item_18035_Description:
A red gem. Used in magic, it balances the senses and sharpens the mind to imminent danger.

Associated Primary Skill: Sword
item_18036_Description:
This banded gem is used in magic to promote grace and give power to the body.

Associated Primary Skill: Unarmed
item_18037_Description:
This gem is dark green with red spots. In magic it is used to command nature.

Associated Primary Skill: Weather Witching
item_18038_Description:
Milky white, this gem is useful in magic that relates to 'new beginnings.'

Associated Primary Skill: Lycanthropy
item_18039_Description:
A soft blue rock. It's useful in curatives and curse removal potions.

Associated Primary Skill: Priest
Associated Secondary Skill: Alchemy
item_18040_Description:
A pretty green gem. Used in magic, it increases comprehension of scientific concepts.

Associated Primary Skill: Ice Magic
Associated Secondary Skill: Geology
item_18041_Description:
A scintillating stone. Used in magic, it can mesmerize and soothe.

Associated Primary Skill: Psychology
item_18042_Description:

Associated Primary Skill: Necromancy
item_18043_Description: A scintillating gemstone. Used in magic, it can protect against death.
item_18044_Description: A bright blue stone, almost teal in color. In magic, it is associated with beaches and waves.
item_18045_Description: A beautiful blue stone. In magic it is associated with flight and the sky.
item_18046_Description:
This green crystal is a type of beryl. Used in magic, it is associated with perfection, richness, and deities.

In its current form, using it in crafting has unpredictable results. When maximized via magic, it's used for crafting certain exotic weapons.
item_18047_Description: This is an orange variety of beryl. Used in magic, it is associated with tailoring. It is the favored color of goblins.
item_18048_Description:
This pale yellow crystal is extremely reflective from certain angles. In magic, it is associated with growth.

When used in Augment Extraction, Sunstone can extract powers that have no specific skill association.
item_18049_Description: This beautiful golden rock has deep striations. In magic, it is associated with animals, hunting, and livestock.
item_18050_Description: This greenish stone seems to have many other colors embedded in it. While some -- especially orcs -- find it beautiful, others find it disconcerting or even ugly. In magic it is associated with curses and the evil eye.
item_18051_Description:
A clear variety of beryl. It is not particularly powerful in magic, but it can be used as a sort of energy dampener.

When used in Augment Extraction, Goshenite can extract powers that have no specific skill association.
item_18052_Description: This white gem with purple streaks is exceptionally strong and makes very resilient jewelry. In magic, it is likewise associated with toughness.
item_18053_Description: Deep crimson in color, this valuable gem is used in magic to ensure good fortune.
item_18054_Description:
A deep blue gem evocative of dark stormy oceans or winter skies. In magic it enhances musical skill.

Associated Primary Skill: Bard
item_18055_Description: A beautiful orb that grew inside an oyster or other mollusc. While geologists don't consider this a gem, jewelers do. It can be used in magic to convey water-related benefits.
item_18056_Description: An incredibly rare form of pearl. It can be used in very-high-end jewelrymaking, and alchemists prize it above all other gems. Geologists, for their part, don't even consider it a gem at all.
item_18057_Description: Deep crimson in color, this gem is known for bringing good luck. This particular ruby kind of looks like a horse if you squint at it.
item_18059_Description: This glittery stone has a fantastic redness.
item_18181_Description: A magical diamond that is flowing with fae power.
item_18182_Description: A magically enhanced piece of fluorite.
item_18183_Description: A large pretty piece of pulsing crystal. It's pleasantly warm to the touch.
