item_55623_Description: An incredible mining pick of orcish make. There is a small device built into the head that lets it rotate, so the orcs can mine by stabbing instead of swinging. Innovative.
item_55624_Description: A marvelous mining pick of orcish make. There is a small device built into the head that lets it rotate, so the orcs can mine by stabbing instead of swinging. Innovative.
item_55625_Description: A prefectly-made mining pick of orcish make. There is a small device built into the head that lets it rotate, so the orcs can mine by stabbing instead of swinging. Innovative.
item_55631_Description: A mining pick of orcish make. Similar to a traditional Orcish Mining Pick but with an accelerated rotational device to allow for better mining via stabbing.
item_55632_Description: The second generation of a mining pick of orcish make. Similar to a traditional Orcish Mining Pick but with an accelerated rotational device to allow for better mining via stabbing.
item_55633_Description: The third generation of a mining pick of orcish make. Similar to a traditional Orcish Mining Pick but with an accelerated rotational device to allow for better mining via stabbing.
item_55634_Description: The fourth generation of a mining pick of orcish make. Similar to a traditional Orcish Mining Pick but with an accelerated rotational device to allow for better mining via stabbing.
item_55635_Description: The fifth generation of a mining pick of orcish make. Similar to a traditional Orcish Mining Pick but with an accelerated rotational device to allow for better mining via stabbing.
item_55641_Description: Named after a dwarven children's folk hero, this hammer's weighting is very odd. But quite powerful when you get the hang of it.
item_5601_Description:
A brined cheese that tastes weirdly floral. Ratkin use this cheese as sustenance in lean times.

Cheese Type: Brine (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_56041_Description: A nice-looking saddle. It's a little pinchy and underpadded, but better than nothing!
item_56101_Description: A small saddlebag for petite ponies.
item_56104_Description: A saddlebag that can hold some stuff.
item_56105_Description: A saddlebag that can hold a nice amount of stuff.
item_56106_Description: This saddlebag has lots of pockets!
item_56107_Description: This saddlebag can hold a lot of stuff.
item_56108_Description: An oversized saddlebag for sturdy mounts.
item_56109_Description: An oversized saddlebag for sturdy mounts.
item_56110_Description: An oversized saddlebag for sturdy mounts.
item_56124_Description: Mystically attuned to your inventory-management needs.
item_56125_Description: An understated saddlebag that is nevertheless quite enchantmented.
item_56126_Description: A bulging bag that's always slightly warm to the touch.
item_56128_Description: Gaudily enchanted with potent portal magic.
item_56130_Description: An awesome work of magical engineering.
item_56210_Description: Very impressive tack for a horse.
item_56254_Description: Basic tack for a horse, with little pouches sewn in for quick access to key items.
item_56258_Description: Excellent tack for a horse, adorned with lots of little pouches.
item_56307_Description: Great horseshoes. Overkill for draft animals, but preferred for travel.
item_56308_Description: Amazing horseshoes. Overkill for draft animals, but preferred for travel.
item_56309_Description: Astounding, yes. But only incrementally better than the amazing horseshoes.
item_56310_Description: Truly awesome horseshoes. Maybe not a huge improvement over the astounding horesehoes, but still awesome!
item_56311_Description: Normally to a novice, a horseshoe is just a horseshoe. But anyone can tell that this is an incredible horseshoe. It feels special.
item_56312_Description: Whisper-thin yet perfectly adaptive, these horseshoes last a lifetime and will never not be marvelous.
item_56354_Description: Decent horseshoes with an anti-water enchantment that helps mounts get out of water faster.
item_56358_Description: Amazing horseshoes that let a mount move through shallow water almost as easily as on land.
item_56401_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of the mystical horse Pantiflax.
item_56402_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of Lemon Vapors, the special Guide mount.
item_56403_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of Zoomer, the racing-reward horse.
item_56404_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of a Nightmare.
item_56405_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of the legendary horse Icemare.
item_56406_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of the legendary horse Icemare, writ large.
item_56407_Description: A magical glamour that can be applied to a horse. When used, it turns their appearance into that of the classic prototype mount.
item_56501_Description: A tophat, to make your mount look extra dapper.
item_56502_Description: Sure, maybe YOU know it's fake, but nobody else will! They'll think you're riding an actual unicorn!
item_56503_Description: Drape your mount in glorious lemons!
item_56505_Description: A bunch of weeds wrapped around a stick, that counts as a banner, right?
item_56507_Description: Congratulations on winning the Moat Circuit!
item_56508_Description: A festive banner with a pumpkin displayed proudly upon it.
item_56510_Description: A festive banner emblazoned with a winter snowflake.
item_56511_Description: A festive banner declaring its Love for Alharth.
item_56512_Description: A festive banner celebrating the joy of Rebirth.
item_56701_Description: Orcs are known for many things, and big-ass swords is one of those things.
item_56_Description: Use this wolf whistle on the teleportation platform south of Serbule Keep.
item_59_Description: A primer on Combat Psychology. (Raises your skill to 1 if you don't know Combat Psychology.)
item_60002_Description: A simple cot for napping. Can be installed in a home or guild hall.
item_60003_Description: A hefty storage chest. Can only be installed in a guild hall.
item_60004_Description: A hefty storage chest. Can only be installed in a guild hall.
item_60005_Description: A thick set of notes detailing how guild storage should be used. Can be installed in a guild hall to allow guildmates to purchase guild storage slots from the convenience of the hall.
item_60006_Description: A sturdy torch in a sconce that can be installed in a home or guild hall.
item_60007_Description: Install into a home or guild hall to let anyone write in it.
item_60008_Description: A simple wooden table that can be installed in a home or guild hall.
item_60009_Description: A hefty storage chest. Can only be installed in a home, and can only be accessed by the homeowner.
item_6008_Description: An unfolding bloom of fried onion. Dipping sauce optional.
item_6009_Description: Boiled cabbage with salt and butter to taste. Not as bad as it sounds!
item_6010_Description: Voted the most under-rated vegetable dish by 4 out of 5 elven gourmands.
item_6012_Description: A heaping head of broccoli with the *perfect* amount of salt and butter.
item_6014_Description: Stuffed with what? Venison, of course!
item_6015_Description: This muffin might sound strange but it is actually quite sweet. Disgusting, but sweet.
item_6017_Description: Apples and strawberries in sweet syrup. A little monotonous.
item_6018_Description: Apples, strawberries, grapes and oranges in sweet syrup.
item_6019_Description: Apples, grapes, oranges and guava in sweet syrup. Who puts guava in fruit cocktail?
item_6020_Description: A loaf of warm, moist banana bread.
item_6022_Description: Unlike most food, this does not give a long-term regeneration effect. Bacon is an instant pick-me-up any time!
item_6023_Description: Tough and dry, but good for gnawing. This provides a quick instant pick-me-up.
item_6025_Description: Just like roast beef - except not.
item_6026_Description: Tasty pork and venison sausage. Just don't ask to see how it's made ...
item_6029_Description: There are worse things to stuff in a mushroom than meat from a mantis claw. Probably.
item_6030_Description: A perfectly edible fish dish, if a bit uninspired.
item_6031_Description: Tasty fish sticks with the heartburny flavor of fried onions.
item_6033_Description: These leftover bits of a Super Fishy Surprise have been mixed together to get an ... "interesting" and "unusual" flavor.
item_6034_Description: Boiled crab meat. Butter is optional.
item_6037_Description: A seasoned shark steak with a wood-fired sweet smoky flavor.
item_6038_Description: Smoked perch with a sweet orange glaze.
item_6039_Description: Three skewers of seafood and vegetables.
item_6040_Description: A baked potato with delicious melted cheese.
item_6041_Description: A baked potato topped with fresh butter.
item_6042_Description: Baked beets in a succulent, simple glaze.
item_6043_Description: Thin, runny, and smelly. Mmm! Salt is a key ingredient.
item_6044_Description: Choice parts of a pig infused with ancient spirits of evil. An instant pick-me-up! Warning: if Ur-Bacon speaks to you, do not speak back. Never follow instructions you receive from evil food of any kind.
item_6046_Description: A bowl of oats and milk. Warm and bland. You should eat a bowl immediately! Food boosts your health and power regeneration rates, and makes combat much easier.
item_6048_Description: Comes with its own handle! An instant fill-up for the not-particularly-discerning bar patron.
item_6050_Description: Stir-fried chicken with broccoli and other vegetables.
item_6051_Description: Baked with a delicate lemon glaze. Delicious!
item_6052_Description: Baked chicken in a complex dish. This one was cooked just right and has a variety of textures.
item_6053_Description: A disgusting concoction created by someone who doesn't understand certain important concepts. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6054_Description:
Some damp biscuits. Not appetizing, but much better than starving!

(For an hour after you eat food, you'll regenerate health and power between fights. And better food than this can regenerate you DURING combat, too!)
item_6055_Description: An odorous dish said to be palatable to psychic mantises.
item_6056_Description: It smells bad, but... it doesn't taste too bad, actually.
item_6057_Description: An improvement over basic hash browns. Greasy and salty, in a good way!
item_6058_Description: Apple Juice! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6059_Description: A baked potato that has been rotated at a perfect consistency for hours. As far as plain ungarnished potatoes go, this is great...
item_6060_Description: Small dried vegetable chunks, magically puffed with air and then filled with sugar and cheese. It's... interesting.
item_6061_Description: This poisonous muffin smells of wood and herbs. It can be used as a test for lycanthropy, as the muffins tend to kill werewolves, while only maiming others.
item_6062_Description: A delicious treat: a banana shallow-fried in sugary butter. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6063_Description: A deceptively simple dish of beets, fish, and meat, somehow made tasty together.
item_6064_Description: A blend of baked vegetables in a hearty cheese sauce.
item_6065_Description: Laura's Neth's melt-in-your-mouth cheese biscuits are to die for. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6066_Description: They may look like a light snack at first glance, but these biscuits are meaty and filling enough for a hearty meal.
item_6068_Description: An orcish staple, famous for its lingering effect. It's... an acquired taste.
item_6069_Description: A very potent Elvish brew. Bitter as can be, but it warms you right up. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6070_Description: Mmm, battered and deep-fried. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6071_Description: Unleavened bread. Not super tasty by itself, but good in sandwiches. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6072_Description: Tasty crabmeat in a makeshift bun. Lemony!
item_6073_Description: Made with whatever meat is available and seasoned within an inch of its life. Most races find the smell pleasant, but the taste much too salty. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6074_Description: A mushy fruit paste that can be eaten as a snack. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6075_Description: A true masterpiece of potato-making. Well, actually, the potato itself is a little soggy. But the toppings are masterful!
item_6076_Description: A tasty baked dish with mutton and veggies.
item_6077_Description: A tasty baked dish with beef and veggies.
item_6078_Description: A pleasant baked dish with odds and ends.
item_6079_Description: Dried meat from unusual creatures. Salted beyond reckoning. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6080_Description: Warm crusty bread, perfect for a cold day. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6081_Description: Cured pig meat with a touch of sugar and a hint of cloves.
item_6082_Description: A cup of heated mushroom blend with a pinch of spices. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6083_Description: A simple, tasty beverage. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6084_Description: A delicious blended fruit drink. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6085_Description: A delicious cold beverage. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6086_Description: A delicious cold beverage. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6087_Description: A pleasant cold beverage. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6088_Description: A thick seasonal drink. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6090_Description: A delicious, if basic, pumpkin pie. It's missing fancy spices! And maybe something to top it with.
item_6092_Description: Gretchen Salas has a way with a potato. These rolls are really good! You can't even taste the potato.
item_6093_Description: An elvish drink. Not quite tea, and not quite fruit juice, but something in between. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6094_Description: An elvish invention. A single fist-sized cube of this will keep you from being hungry all day. It tastes like fruitcake.
item_6095_Description: A bell pepper full of steak! Mm. Meaty.
item_6096_Description: A stir-fried vegetarian dish with more than a hint of spice.
item_6097_Description: Supposedly a favorite of mountain-dwelling orcs. Fresh mutton topped with cheese and peppers.
item_6098_Description: A tough but highly portable snack consisting of chewy shark meat in a fried pepper husk. It's an acquired taste.
item_6099_Description: A heady mixture of edible mushrooms in a green pepper "bowl".
item_60_Description: A chisel with a magical tip designed to chip away magical crystal.
item_6100_Description: An advanced preparation of the humble bird. Delicious!
item_6101_Description: A very spicy version of Aromatic Chicken. Not for the faint of heart.
item_6102_Description: A stew which is definitely better than the sum of its ingredients.
item_6103_Description: An exotic meal that uses a rare fish found only in the deepest of caves. The fish is delicious, but has a slightly bitter aftertaste that has to be drowned out by tons of lemon.
item_6104_Description: A bizarre snack that uses a rare fish found only in the deepest of caves. You eat it scales and all. It takes some getting used to.
item_6105_Description: An unexpectedly refreshing drink. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6106_Description: The perfect refreshment after desert exertion. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6107_Description: An unusual tea with a strong kick. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6108_Description: This drink has a not-too-great flavor, but it's very good at rehydrating tired bodies. The preferred desert beverage of people who are too rich to drink water. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6109_Description: Venison fried in butter and coated in fresh-cracked pepper. A restorative treat!
item_6110_Description: A delicious snack food. It's ... some sort of meat... drenched in a sweet sauce and wrapped in dough. Selaxi refuses to part with the recipe. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6111_Description: A tasty beverage of cactus juice and some sweet ingredient Selaxi refuses to share. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6112_Description: An invention of the yeti people, this kabob-like snack is best eaten before you learn the ingredients. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6113_Description: A yeti invention of boiled mutton in matted fur. The stench is impressive. The taste is unique, and not as bad as you'd expect.
item_6114_Description: A delicious seasonal tea. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6115_Description: A pie so good that it would be foolish to eat it as just a dessert. Eat it as a meal.
item_6116_Description: Hard on the outside, runny liquid on the inside. Mmm...
item_6117_Description: Runny and hot and covered in salt and pepper. Ideal with some bread.
item_6118_Description: This is just some raw eggs in a glass, blended with a little milk. Gross. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6119_Description: Somebody wove some long bacon strips into a sort of bowl. And then put chunks of fried meat into the bowl. Weird. Salty.
item_6120_Description: It's a scrambled egg, beloved breakfast of nearly every sentient race.
item_6121_Description: It's... a clownfish. Dried and salted. Snack-sized. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6123_Description: A well-preserved and salted fish, perfect for snacking. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6124_Description: A well-preserved and salted fish. This makes an amazing snack! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6127_Description: A well-preserved and salted fish. An ... interesting... snack. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6128_Description: Low-quality pieces of cat meat have been sliced extraordinarily thin, tenderized, and then buried in salt. The result is a cup of hot stew that tastes ... salty. But not horrible. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6129_Description: Cat meat coated in a thick orange sauce. Surprisingly not terrible.
item_6130_Description: The perfect seasonings make cat meat not just palatable, but actually tasty.
item_6131_Description: Dried meat and fish in a secret blend of spices. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6132_Description: Made from the tender tentacles of young kraken, this meal is quite the delicacy.
item_6133_Description: It stinks! And it tastes vinegary. But it's... it's edible.
item_6134_Description: Picked beets in a secret alpha-development sauce. (This item cannot be crafted. It provides benefits equivalent to a level 25 Meal item, but it has no Gourmand requirement. A normal level 25 Meal requires Gourmand level 10+.)
item_6135_Description: Fried cat-meat in a house blend of spices and lightly breaded.
item_6136_Description: Shaved ice flavored with apple. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6137_Description: Shaved ice flavored with strawberries. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6138_Description: Shaved ice flavored with grapes. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6139_Description: Shaved ice flavored with orange juice. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6140_Description: Shaved ice flavored with guava. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6141_Description: Shaved ice flavored with pureed banana. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6142_Description: Shaved ice flavored with lemon juice. This treat should be eaten quickly before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6143_Description: Fresh, cold, and delicious. Eat it before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6144_Description: A well-made omelet is an attractive and delicious meal. This one's full of ham and cheese.
item_6146_Description: Fresh, cold, and delicious. Eat it before it melts! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6147_Description: Delicious long-grain rice, as prepared in Rahu.
item_6148_Description: Raw clownfish on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6149_Description: Raw crab meat on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6150_Description: Raw grapefish on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6151_Description: Raw perch on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6152_Description: Raw eel on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6153_Description: Raw cavefish on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6154_Description: Raw shark on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6155_Description: Raw clownfish wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6156_Description: Raw crab meat wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6157_Description: Raw grapefish wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6158_Description: Raw perch wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6159_Description: Raw eel wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6160_Description: Raw cavefish wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6161_Description: Raw shark wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6162_Description: An old mini-loaf made to last decades. The outside is as hard as a rock, but the inside is still edible.
item_6165_Description: A tiny tart with cinnamon-pumpkin filling.
item_6166_Description: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from the Project: Gorgon team! Thanks for playing and supporting us!
item_6167_Description: Congratulations from the Project: Gorgon team! Thanks for playing and supporting us!
item_6168_Description: Raw vexfish on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6169_Description: Tasty raw vexfish wrapped in seaweed, on a ball of delicious rice.
item_6170_Description: A stack of orcish breakfast pancakes.
item_6172_Description: Eel prepared in the orcish way: coated in cheese.
item_6173_Description: A fancy plate of snack foods. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6179_Description: Fresh creamy yogurt with strawberries. A sweet snack. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6180_Description: A nice fresh loaf. It's a dense and filling bread.
item_6181_Description: A nice fresh loaf, filled with nuts. It's extremely dense bread and very filling.
item_6182_Description: A secret variety of rice cultivated in Rahu. Most citizens know it exists, but few know exactly where or how it is made.
item_6184_Description: Apples, strawberries, and grapes in sweet syrup. It's good... but not great.
item_6185_Description: A snack of sweetened strawberries. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6186_Description: Thick-sliced slab bacon from the most savory pork shoulder. Unlike most food, this does not give a long-term regeneration effect. Great Bacon is an instant pick-me-up any time!
item_6188_Description: These carrot-flavored biscuits seem to be just as good as real carrots... to rabbits. They're pretty terrible-tasting to everybody else. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6189_Description: Cheesy breaded porcini mushrooms with a lot of heat! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6190_Description: A watery soup. Edible but not at all inspiring.
item_6192_Description: A tasty snack. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6196_Description: It's a filling meal, but nobody's going to ask you for the recipe.
item_6198_Description: Pork chops in a delicious sweet sauce.
item_6199_Description: A snack of sugar-glazed grapes. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_61_Description: Dear player, thank you for completing this quest. If this were a complete MMO, you would have received a fun reward now. Maybe next time! - Eric
item_6200_Description: It's an apple coated in a sugar glaze so thick that it hurts your teeth to bite into. A somewhat tedious treat. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6202_Description: A dish that could really use some spice. But it's tasty anyway.
item_6206_Description: It's an egg scrambled with onions and topped with hash browns.
item_6207_Description: Fresh and sugary! (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6209_Description: This candy has some sort of horrible flavor. Licorice? It's awful. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6210_Description: A sweet disk of hard candy. It's supposed to taste like... SOMETHING... but it's impossible to say what. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6211_Description: A sweet disk of hard candy that tastes of watermelon. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6212_Description: A sweet and spicy disk of hard candy. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6213_Description: A vaguely grape-flavored disk of candy on a small stick. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6214_Description: A sweet and minty disk of hard candy on a handy stick. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6215_Description: A fruity disk of hard candy on a stick. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6216_Description: Exotic-flavored candy that's unlike any natural food you've tasted. Candy aficionados love it.  (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6217_Description: Exotic candy that combines unlikely flavors. Candy connoisseurs swear by it. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6218_Description: Amazing candy that can only be truly appreciated by expert gourmands. Comes in a bit of wax paper to prevent outside odors from diluting its flavor bouquet. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6219_Description: A very simple version of the classic human cookie. Edible, but probably best used for decoration. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6220_Description: A nuanced and tasty version of the classic human treat. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_6221_Description: A nice blend of sweetness and mintiness.

item_6552_Description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.
item_6553_Description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.
item_6554_Description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.
item_6555_Description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.
item_6556_Description: A lump of flesh. Very disturbing. Very chewy.
item_6557_Description: A pleasant biscuit with a rustic, nutty flavor.
item_65_Description: Teaches you the basics of Fletching. (Raises your skill to 1 if it isn't already.)
item_6660_Description: An evil-looking egg. Probably best not to eat this.
item_6661_Description: Whatever type of meat this once was, it's completely overrun with demonic energy now.
item_6662_Description: A basic but filling rye. Has a complex aroma and hints of molasses.
item_6663_Description: A dense and delicious rye bread with strong hints of beer.
item_6664_Description: A plain but tasty loaf of sourdough.
item_6665_Description: A rich, dense, slightly sweet bread.
item_6666_Description:
A hard-boiled egg, sliced in half, with the yolk taken out and replaced with the essence of an infernal hellspawn, then sprinkled with some spices. Just like mom used to make!

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.
item_6667_Description:
An unidentifiable hunk of meat, imbued with demonic essence, and roasted to perfection.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.
item_6668_Description:
A tasty soup with little bits of delectable meat floating around in it, infused with demonic essence.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.
item_6669_Description:
A spongey cake with a light icing applied to the outside of it. Not made from actual angels, but from the purified essence of demon... close enough, right?

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.
item_6670_Description:
A human dish popular in the Crone Hegemony. This one is topped with tiny infernal souls that dance across the cheese and let out little hellish screams from time to time. So cute!

Note: Souls do not count as meat, so this is technically vegetarian.

In addition to the usual food effects, this meal also reduces the power cost effect of Hellfire by 25%.
item_6672_Description: A powerful pick-me-up for rabbits in danger.
item_6675_Description: A sweet yet savory holiday meal.
item_6676_Description: A loaf of enticing, lucious banana bread.
item_6677_Description: A heavenly snack that is squash-flavored, but in a good way.
item_6678_Description: A sugary-sweet snack. (This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.)
item_66_Description: Teaches you how to perform Unarmed kicks. Only useful if you somehow managed to get turned into an animal before learning the Unarmed Kick ability. (Raises your Unarmed skill to 1 if it isn't already.)
item_69_Description: This potion transforms you into a spider. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_6_Description: This bucket is full of clean, delicious water. It's not usable on its own, but it can be used to fill up containers which can better distribute the water further.
item_71_Description: Teaches you the Myconian language. (This is a testing aid and will not be available for long; please use this to test the Myconian dungeon, which can be accessed via random brown mushrooms in Serbule.)
item_72_Description: Lets you fly for 30 minutes (press the Move Up key to begin). You'll take no damage from falls while the effect lasts.
item_73_Description: You become a raven. Use the Move Up key to fly. Your attacks will do negligible damage. But you can fly, so that's something.
item_74_Description: Teaches you how to survey, find minerals, and mine ore. (Raises your skill in Surveying, Geology, and Mining to 1 if they aren't already.)
item_75_Description: Test potion transforms you into a cow. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_77_Description: It's a note labeled "To my dear friend."
item_79_Description: Turns off PvP caused by PvP Juice test-potions.
item_80_Description: Makes you PvP-flagged for a half hour. You can attack other players who are also PvP-flagged.
item_81_Description: Makes you PvP for an hour.
item_82_Description: Strange weeds that supposedly bring the dead back to life.
item_83_Description: Makes you PvP against ALL players -- even ones who don't want to PvP! Used for live events only! Use UnPvPJuice to turn it off.
item_84_Description: Potion transforms you into a GIGANTIC spider. Permanent until dispelled via UnspiderJuice. For live events only!
item_85_Description: Teaches you how to create visual arts. (Raises your skill to 1 if it isn't already.)
item_86_Description: Test potion transforms you into a giant bat. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_88_Description: When you aren't in combat, hold down Shift to run very, very fast. You also take no damage from falls. Lasts 5 minutes.
item_89_Description: Gives you a blank appearance. Consume a minor panacea to return to normal.
item_90_Description: Transforms you into a rabbit. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_92_Description: Transforms you into a spirit fox. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_94_Description: Transforms you into a skeleton. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_96_Description: Transforms you into a rabbit. Permanent until dispelled! WARNING: think before you drink!
item_97_Description: Makes you a vampire. Permanent! Cannot be cured even with a Minor Panacea.
